title: Grilled Sashimi with Sweet Shortening Sauce
description: A unique and refreshing dish that brings together the delicate flavors of sashimi and the richness of sweet shortening. Serve immediately for the best experience.
instructions: 1. Cut the sashimi-grade salmon into thin slices.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the shortening, honey, and lemon juice until smooth.
3. Arrange the salmon slices on a plate or platter.
4. Drizzle the shortening sauce over the salmon.
5. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
